title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and Multi-Chart Visualizations

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and Multi-Chart Visualizations

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
   <rect x='50%' y='30%' width='200' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/>
   <text x='50%' y='32%' dominant-baseline='hanging' text-anchor='middle' fill='#C06C88' font-size='16'>Query Playground</text>
   <rect x='50%' y='70%' width='200' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/>
   <text x='50%' y='72%' dominant-baseline='hanging' text-anchor='middle' fill='#C06C88' font-size='16'>Multi-Chart Visualizations</text>
   <rect x='50%' y='110%' width='200' height='120' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='5'/>
   <rect x='60%' y='120%' width='120' height='120' fill='#C06C88' rx='5'/>
   <rect x='60%' y='240%' width='120' height='60' fill='#C06C88' rx='5'/>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement a dynamic query playground with slider inputs and an update button
Must include a multi-chart visualization component with at least 3 charts and interactive tooltips

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and Multi-Chart Visualizations

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, dynamic slider inputs, chart interactivity, and query execution.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, efficient state use, and adherence to Tailwind CSS best practices.
